text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And then, Prez said another of her jokes…

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I just remembered the last joke
of hers you told me… Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's funny! "Teio, you're shining…
They glow up so fast." Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew… Her jokes are great…
Really remind me of home.
